Name: Tirtir Mask Fit Red Cushion
Description_Short: #1 Best-seller. Provides 72-hour coverage with a Satin finish. Perfect for normal to combination skin.
How_To_Use: Press the puff into the sponge and pat gently onto the face. Apply a second layer for higher coverage.
Full_Description: The legendary #1 best-seller in Japan. This cushion offers powerful 72-hour coverage with a sleek Satin finish. Enriched with Hibiscus and Red Algae extract (Astaxanthin) to maintain skin radiance and prevent oxidation. The unique egg-shaped puff allows for precise application around the nose and eyes.

Name: Tirtir Mask Fit All-Cover Cushion
Description_Short: A high-coverage cushion with a velvety Matte finish. Controls oil effectively for up to 72 hours.
How_To_Use: Tap lightly onto skin for high coverage. Focus on the T-zone if you have oily skin. No powder needed.
Full_Description: Designed for those who need maximum coverage with a Velvety Matte finish. It effectively covers blemishes, redness, and pores while controlling excess sebum for up to 72 hours. Contains Niacinamide to brighten skin over time. Transfer-proof and long-wearing.

Name: Tirtir Mask Fit Aura Cushion
Description_Short: Creates a breathable, water-glow Dewy finish. Deeply hydrates dry skin for a radiant look.
How_To_Use: Apply generously for a glass-skin effect. Can be layered without looking cakey.
Full_Description: A glow-boosting cushion that creates a breathable, water-glow Dewy finish. Infused with White Hyaluronic Acid and Birch Sap to deeply hydrate dry skin from within. Provides natural coverage that looks like healthy, radiant skin.

Name: Mask Fit Tone Up Essence
Description_Short: (Beige) A moisture-packed primer that corrects skin tone for a natural "naked skin" look.
How_To_Use: Apply a thin layer before cushion foundation. Can be worn alone on light makeup days.
Full_Description: (Beige) An all-in-one primer and tone-up essence. Contains Coconut Milk and Peach Extract to hydrate and blur pores. Provides a natural beige tint that evens out skin tone for a "naked skin" look. SPF 30 PA++ protection included.

Name: Waterism Glow Tint
Description_Short: Hydrating lip tint delivers a plumping effect, dazzling shine, and up to 12 hours of continuous moisture.
How_To_Use: Press the applicator onto lips and dab gently for a natural glow. Layer once more to intensify color and shine.
Full_Description: Experience the perfect blend of hydration and shine with the TIRTIR Waterism Glow Tint. This hydrating lip tint delivers a plumping effect, dazzling shine, and up to 12 hours of continuous moisture. With 9 natural shades to enhance your beauty, it’s the ultimate accessory for lips that look and feel irresistibly soft, smooth, and radiant.

Name: Waterism Glow Melting Balm
Description_Short: Provides long-lasting moisture, a dazzling shine, and a 3D volume effect for a radiant, healthy glow.
How_To_Use: Glide directly onto lips and layer as needed for enhanced shine and hydration.
Full_Description: Achieve soft, plump lips with the TIRTIR Waterism Glow Melting Balm, a hydrating lip balm that provides long-lasting moisture, a dazzling shine, and a 3D volume effect for a radiant, healthy glow. This lightweight balm is perfect for those who want hydrated, glossy lips in one effortless step.

Name: Mini Waterism Glow Tint
Description_Short: Enhances your natural beauty and comes in a convenient mini size, perfect for travel or on-the-go touch-ups
How_To_Use: Apply evenly onto lips using the applicator and layer to build color, shine, and hydration as desired.
Full_Description: The TIRTIR Mini Waterism Glow Tint is a hydrating lip tint that delivers 12 hours of continuous moisture, a plumping effect, and a radiant shine. Available in 30 natural shades, it enhances your natural beauty and comes in a convenient mini size, perfect for travel or on-the-go touch-ups!

Name: Water Mellow Lip Balm
Key_Ingredients: Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Bis-Behenyl/Iso stearyl/Phytosteryl Dimer Dilino leyl Dimer Dilinoleate
Description_Short: Designed to keep your lips soft, smooth, and nourished
How_To_Use: Apply directly to lips for instant hydration and a sheer, glossy tint; reapply as needed throughout the day.
Full_Description: Transform your lip care routine with the TIRTIR Water Mellow Lip Balm, a luxurious, hydrating balm that delivers a watercolor-like tint with a glossy, non-sticky finish. Designed to keep your lips soft, smooth, and nourished, this balm is the ultimate everyday essential for achieving radiant, natural-looking lips with a touch of shine.

Name: Mask Fit Make Up Fixer
Description_Short: Keeps makeup fresh and smudge-proof all day. Essential for Cushion users.
How_To_Use: Shake well. Spray 20-30cm away from face in an 'X' and 'T' motion after makeup. Let dry naturally.
Full_Description: A fine-mist setting spray that locks makeup in place all day. Creates a lightweight polymer film to prevent transfer and smudging (mask-proof). Contains Centella Asiatica to keep skin calm and hydrated underneath makeup.

Name: Ceramic Cream
Description_Short: Rich texture cream that melts into skin to build a strong ceramic moisture barrier.
How_To_Use: Warm a small amount between fingers and press gently into the skin as the last step of your routine.
Full_Description: A rich, pottery-smooth cream that builds a strong moisture barrier. Formulated with Polyglutamic Acid and Shea Butter to lock in hydration for 24 hours. Ideal for very dry or compromised skin that needs intensive repair and protection against harsh weather.

Name: Collagen Core Glow Mask
Description_Short: A no-wash bubble mask that provides a peeling effect and lifting glow.
How_To_Use: Shake can. Dispense foam into hands and apply to face. Let bubbles absorb (do not rinse). Follow with makeup.
Full_Description: A no-wash aesthetic bubble mask. Dispenses rich bubbles containing Vegan Collagen and Glutathione that gently exfoliate dead skin cells and infuse elasticity. Provides a "lifting" effect and instant glass-skin glow in just 5 minutes.

Name: Collagen Lifting Eye Cream
Description_Short: Features a cooling metal applicator to depuff eyes and firm up fine lines instantly.
How_To_Use: Squeeze a small amount and use the metal tip to massage around the eye contours in upward motions.
Full_Description: A premium eye cream featuring a cooling metal applicator tip. Infused with Plant Collagen, Retinol, and Peptides to firm up the eye area, reduce puffiness, and smooth out fine lines. The applicator allows for a hygienic and relaxing massage.

Name: Milk Skin Toner
Description_Short: Viral Product. A highly concentrated toner that gives instant "Glass Skin" glow.
How_To_Use: Pour into palms and pat into skin (7-skin method recommended). Or use as a toner mask with cotton pads.
Full_Description: The viral "Glass Skin" toner. A highly concentrated formula with Rice Bran Extract, Niacinamide, and Ceramides. It combines the hydration of a cream with the lightweight absorption of a toner. Instantly brightens dull skin and strengthens the moisture barrier.

Name: Ceramic Milk Ampoule
Description_Short: Correction: A triple-layer oil-moisture ampoule for deep hydration and porcelain glow.
How_To_Use: Shake well to mix oil and moisture layers. Apply 2-3 drops and massage into the face.
Full_Description: A triple-layer oil-moisture ampoule that mimics the skin's lipid structure. Contains Vegan Milk Complex and Squalane to provide deep nourishment and a porcelain-like glow. Shake well to mix the layers before use to unlock comprehensive hydration.

Name: Organic Jojoba Oil
Description_Short: 100% pure organic oil that mimics human sebum. Use on face, body, or mix with foundation for glow.
How_To_Use: Massage 1-2 drops onto face. Can be mixed with foundation for an extra glowy finish.
Full_Description: 100% pure, cold-pressed Organic Jojoba Oil. Its molecular structure is similar to human sebum, allowing it to penetrate deeply without clogging pores. A multi-use savior for dry patches, cuticles, and split ends.

Name: SOS Serum
Description_Short: An emergency rescue serum that instantly soothes irritated and red skin.
How_To_Use: Apply after toner. Focus on areas with redness or breakouts. Safe for use morning and night.
Full_Description: An emergency rescue serum for irritated skin. Packed with Polyglutamic Acid (holds 5x more moisture than Hyaluronic Acid) and Centella Asiatica to instantly calm redness and soothe inflammation. Features a lightweight, non-sticky texture.

Name: Hydro Boost Enzyme Cleansing Balm
Description_Short: Sherbet-texture balm that melts away heavy makeup and blackheads.
How_To_Use: Massage onto dry face to melt makeup. Add water to emulsify and rinse.
Full_Description: A gentle enzyme cleansing balm that transforms from sherbet to oil to milk. Deeply cleanses pores and removes waterproof makeup without stripping skin.

Name: Dermatir Pure Rosemary Calming Mask
Description_Short: Premium essence made of 100% Rosemary extract to calm skin.
How_To_Use: Soak cotton pad and place on face as a mask, or pat directly.
Full_Description: Made with 100% Jeju Rosemary extract, brewed for 72 hours. Rich in antioxidants to soothe irritated skin and improve skin barrier texture. Clean beauty favorite.

Name: Hydro UV Shield Sunscreen
Description_Short: Moisturizing sunscreen that feels like a light lotion.
How_To_Use: Apply liberally 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours.
Full_Description: A lightweight essence-like sunscreen that provides strong UV protection without a white cast. Infused with Birch Sap to hydrate skin like a moisturizer making it perfect for dry skin types.

Name: Milk Creamy Foam Cleanser
Description_Short: A gentle creamy foam cleanser.
How_To_Use: Lather with water and massage face.
Full_Description:
Achieve a Deep, Hydrating Cleanse

Discover the TIRTIR Milk Creamy Foam Cleanser, a unique 3-step cream cheese mask-to-foam cleanser designed to deliver a thorough yet gentle cleanse with a hydrating, milky finish. This innovative formula, whipped 5,000 times, transforms your cleansing routine into a luxurious, sensorial experience.

Name: Matcha Skin Toner
Description_Short: Soothing toner for oily skin.
How_To_Use: Apply to cotton pad and wipe skin.
Full_Description:
Matcha Latte for Your Skin

Soothe and hydrate with the TIRTIR Matcha Calming Toner—infused with 10,000 ppm Matcha-PDRN and a Soymilk Complex for deep nourishment and moisture balance. This mildly acidic, non-irritating formula calms redness, restores skin’s natural pH, and absorbs quickly with Micro Dipping Tech for an even, refreshed complexion.

Name: Matcha Calming Cream
Description_Short: Non-sticky gel moisturizer.
How_To_Use: Apply as last step of skincare.
Full_Description:
Soothing Strength, All Day Long

The TIRTIR Matcha Calming Cream is a bouncy pudding-textured moisturizer that wraps the skin in soothing care while boosting firmness and elasticity. Infused with 10,000 ppm Matcha-PDRN, vegan collagen, and 13 peptides, it calms redness, strengthens the skin barrier, and delivers 24-hour hydration. Lightweight yet cushioning, it’s perfect for sensitive skin that needs both comfort and resilience.

Name: Matcha Calming Duo Set
Description_Short: Full soothing routine for oily skin.
How_To_Use: Step 1 Toner Step 2 Cream.
Full_Description:
Calm. Hydrate. Strengthen.
The TIRTIR Matcha Calming Duo pairs the Matcha Calming Toner and Matcha Calming Cream for the ultimate soothing routine. Powered by Matcha-PDRN and skin-strengthening complexes, this two-step ritual helps reduce redness, restore balance, and provide long-lasting hydration—perfect for sensitive, stressed, or redness-prone skin.

Matcha Calming Toner (150 ml): A mildly acidic, lightweight toner with 10,000 ppm Matcha-PDRN and Soymilk Complex. Absorbs quickly to soothe irritation, balance pH, and prep skin for care.

Matcha Calming Cream (50 ml): A bouncy pudding-textured cream with vegan collagen, peptides, and Matcha-PDRN. Wraps skin in 24-hour hydration while boosting elasticity and protecting against external stressors.

Together, they deliver calm, comfort, and barrier support in just two easy steps.
